grade_decomposition.grade0: all C_i even and all F_i even
grade_decomposition.grade1: all C_i even and exactly three F_i are odd
grade_decomposition.grade2: all C_i even and the number of odd F_i is in {1,2,4,5,6}
grade_decomposition.grade3: at least one C_i is odd

interpretation: A985-weighted stack counting at the six-object shadow; the raw tensor mass budget is outside the q<=512 mixed-term window before normalization.
tensor_collapse: sum_{alpha,beta} p_{alpha,beta,gamma}, grouped by the output object-pair of gamma, equals 2576*M6

variables.C_i: six target-side stack dimensions indexed by B-,B+,V-,V+,S-,S+
variables.F_i: six source-side stack dimensions indexed by B-,B+,V-,V+,S-,S+
